case_title: TAYLOR, GEORGE vs. FAIRBANKS, JEFFREY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRBANKS, JEFFREY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-05-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-07-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-19-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-12-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON JAN-12-1999, SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ALBERT M KUN, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-27-1999 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-05-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO PAY SANCTIONS; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ALBERT M KUN HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS RETURNED SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GEORGE UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT FAIRBANKS, JEFFREY

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-17-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE, OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ALBERT M KUN WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-01-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAR-17-1999 TO APR-28-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-28-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-28-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ALBERT KUN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-13-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-28-1999 TO JUN-23-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
